name: The AnkiDote
author: mord58562
description: Unified medical-reference sidebar for Anki: StatPearls + DrugBank highlighting and popups, an UpToDate institutional-SSO browser dock, and a bring-your-own-account AI chat dock (Claude / ChatGPT / Gemini / Copilot / Perplexity / DeepSeek / Grok / Duck.ai). Free and open source - the StatPearls and DrugBank features work without any paid service; UpToDate features are optional and require your own UTD subscription or institutional access.
